name: neuro-commerce-os
description: Complete Business Operating System — Diagnostic → Brand → Content → Ads → Growth. Executes the full NextLuma 5-phase framework with 18 skills and a 22-agent crew (5 phase commanders + orchestrator + 16 sub-crews). v2.0: state-machine-enforced execution (initialize_os_session → request_next_step → submit_deliverable, 18 locked Phase-1 steps), intent routing (standard-ecommerce vs custom blueprint), SQLite FTS5 RAG memory with Token Shield (raw docx/pdf never enter context), locked-character video generation (OpenRouter input_references), NeuroSystem (store_learning / prime_context / override_memory + Synapse event bus + neuroplasticity cycle), and a Zero-Command MCP Apps UI (dashboards, Action Cards, setup wizard, model routing). Ships its own MCP server (36 tools) + local n8n automation + video/social reel diagnostics + NextLuma PowerPoint decks. Free-tool fallbacks throughout.
